# OpenAI Status - Incident History

Page generated: Thu, 10 Apr 2026

## Services Monitored

**ChatGPT Features:**
- Conversations/Chat, Voice mode (dictation), File uploads/downloads, Pinned chats
- Image generation, Search, Deep Research, Artifact generation (spreadsheets, slideshows)
- Enterprise and Education workspaces, Free and Guest plans, ChatGPT Go
- ChatGPT Pro (versions 5.2, 5.4), Custom GPTs
- Connectors/Apps (Excel Plugin, third-party integrations), ChatGPT Atlas, Shopping Research

**APIs & Platforms:**
- Chat Completions API, Completions API (gpt-5-nano), Responses API
- Realtime API (with SIP endpoints, EU region), Fine-tuning API
- Embeddings (text-embedding-3-small), Images/DALL-E generation
- Batch API, Moderations API, Compliance API, Agent API, Audio API

**Video & Media:**
- Sora (video generation, Sora 2)

**Developer Tools:**
- Codex Web/Cloud, API Platform, Audit logs

## Recent Incidents

### April 10: API Platform Login and Account Creation Issues
- API platform login and account creation experiencing instability
- Status: Active/Investigating

### April 2: ChatGPT Dictation Elevated Error Rate
- Voice mode/dictation experienced elevated error rates
- Status: Resolved

### April 2: High Error Rate for Completions API (gpt-5-nano)
- Chat Completions service experienced high error rate specifically for gpt-5-nano model
- Status: Resolved

### March 31: ChatGPT Enterprise/Edu SSO Issues
- Elevated failures for some users joining ChatGPT Enterprise and ChatGPT Edu workspaces via SSO
- Status: Resolved

### March 29: Account Creation and Login Instability
- Account creation and login are unstable across all surfaces
- Status: Resolved

### March 26-27: Responses API and Sora Issues
- Elevated error rates affecting Responses service and Sora video generation
- Status: Resolved

### March 25: File Management Disruption
- Problems downloading and previewing project files
- Status: Resolved

### March 24: Multiple Service Issues
- Realtime API SIP endpoints elevated error rates
- Sync app creation and operation issues in Connectors/Apps
- Project and File Upload Errors
- Status: Resolved

### March 21: Pinned Chats Not Loading
- Pinned chats are not loading on web browsers for ChatGPT
- Status: Resolved

### March 18: Sora Video Generation Failing
- Sora video generation failing
- Status: Resolved

Date span of full history: January 26, 2026 - April 10, 2026.

Updated: 2026-04-10
